name: Obsidian LiveSync
description: Syncs your agent's workspace with an Obsidian vault using the Setup URI and Passphrase.
author: Raul

setup_uri.description: The 'obsidian://setuplivesync?settings=...' URI or the settings string.

tools.name: obsidian_sync_file
tools.description: Syncs a local file from the workspace to the Obsidian vault in CouchDB.

filePath.description: Relative path of the file in the workspace

tools.name: obsidian_pull_vault
tools.description: Downloads and reconstructs the entire Obsidian vault from CouchDB to the local workspace.
